title: SDA Requests Industry Feedback on Tranche 3 Transport Layer Upsilon Variant Draft Solicitation
authors_or_org: Space Development Agency (US Space Force / DoD)
claim_supported: SDA draft solicitation for ~40 T3TLu space vehicles (4 planes of 10), to be split between two vendor teams, "subject to available funding"; posted Jan 23 2025.

notes: Establishes SDA Tranche 3 Transport Layer as a real, named, quantified procurement; does not itself confirm electric-propulsion content (see A-13-S04/S05 for EP-specific buyer behavior). Cross-check A-13-S02 for funding-status risk.

title: L3Harris to sell majority stake in space propulsion unit to AE Industrial for $845 million

notes: Updates idea's competitive premise: the 'flagship supplier orphaned inside a missile-focused conglomerate' condition is being actively resolved via PE-backed spinout, not left to decay -- a freshly-capitalized, refocused Rocketdyne is a stronger 2027-2030 competitor than the 2026 seed assumed.

notes: Confirms real SDA-driven EP demand (closes the seed's 'SDA EP content unconfirmed' flag) AND confirms the idea's own stated risk -- 'primes may vertically integrate PPUs' -- is already happening at the thruster level for a major SDA prime.

notes: INDEPENDENT SECOND demand source alongside A-13-S01/S04: corroborates real, large, currently-supply-constrained EP demand from a named government buyer (SDA) via named integrators (Redwire, Terran Orbital) distinct from York/Orbion. Article covers thrusters broadly, not PPUs specifically, but PPU is an inseparable thruster subsystem.

title: New Space Export Control Rules Offer Regulatory Relief

notes: Cert/export baseline for a 2030 launch: US GaN PPU exports remain ITAR/EAR-controlled for most destinations; Rocket Lab markets an explicitly 'ITAR/EAR-free' competing thruster (Gauss), a differentiation risk noted in the evidence file.

notes: CRITICAL export/supply-chain risk for a gallium-based liquid-metal TIM company: the core raw-material input is 98% China-controlled and was under direct export restriction to the US as recently as Dec 2024.
